――それで、どうだった？<br>俺は初心な小僧だったか？: So, how was it? Was I just a naive little boy?
ふふ……それを聞いてしまう時点でまだまだ小僧じゃよ。<br>余裕というものが足り:
Fufu... The very fact you ask shows you're still a boy. You lack
composure.
さっきまで処女だったのに偉そうだな……。<br>そもそもどうしてあんな態度で挑発:
That's pretty arrogant for someone who was a virgin until just now...
And why did you come at me so provocatively in the first place?
あれぐらいのほうがお主にとっては抱きやすいかと思ってな。<br>ワシが深刻に迫っ:
I thought that'd make it easier for you to have me. If I came on too
strong, you'd be troubled, wouldn't you?
別に困りはしないが……。<br>まあ、おかげ気兼ねなく抱けたよ。:
It wouldn't have been a problem... But thanks to that, I could take you
without any reservations.
ほほっ、そうじゃろうそうじゃろう。永く守ることになった処女じゃが、<br>その重:
Hoho, that's right, that's right. I kept my virginity for a long time, but
I didn't want to burden you with that weight.
ふん、俺をナメすぎだ。<br>ジェンマの重ねてきた年月くらい、しっかり背負ってや:
You underestimate me. I'll bear the weight of the years you've
accumulated.
む、ワシの処女をそこらの女と一緒にするでないぞ。<br>小僧以外のいい男も散々見:
Don't you dare compare my virginity to some common woman's! I've
seen plenty of good men besides you, boy, but never gave myself to any!
そりゃ光栄だ、が……。<br>言葉にされると確かに重荷かもな。:
That's an honor, but... When you say it like that, it really does sound
like a heavy burden.
それでも背負うと言ったんじゃ、<br>せいぜいワシに相応しいぐらいのいい男になる: You said you'd carry it, so you'd best become a man worthy of me!
……ワシもお主のために、もっといい女になってやるわ。<br>期待しておれよ、はっ:
...And I'll become an even better woman for you, boy. Just you wait,
Ha ha ha!
